sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Susan Menzel Sells Shares of CF Industries Holdings Inc (CF)
feed.summary: Susan Menzel, Executive Vice President and Chief Administrative Officer of CF Industries Holdings Inc, sold 18,041 shares of the company on March 12, 2026, reducing her holdings to 55,762 shares. Over the past year, Menzel has sold a total of 49,228 shares, with no insider purchases recorded. The stock was trading at $136.06, indicating it is significantly overvalued based on its GuruFocus Value of $98.72.

feed.title: Insider Sell: W Will Sells 81,651 Shares of CF Industries Holdin
feed.summary: W Will, a Director at CF Industries Holdings Inc (CF), sold 81,651 shares of the company on March 13, 2026. This transaction reduced Will's holdings to 54,995 shares, and follows a pattern of 25 insider sells and no buys for the company over the past year. Shares were trading at $126.56, suggesting the stock might be significantly overvalued according to GuruFocus's intrinsic value estimate of $98.72.

feed.title: S.F. puts PG&E on notice as it seeks state probe into mass outages
feed.summary: San Francisco officials, led by Mayor Daniel Lurie and City Attorney David Chiu, are demanding a state investigation into PG&E following a December substation fire that caused mass power outages affecting 130,000 homes and businesses. The city leaders expressed deep concern over the recurring nature of PG&E's service failures and are urging the California Public Utilities Commission (CPUC) to open a formal probe. PG&E acknowledges the city's concerns and commits to cooperating with any CPUC directives.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Gina Trombley Sells Shares of Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies Corp (WAB)
feed.summary: Gina Trombley, Executive Vice President of Sales & Marketing at Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies Corp (WAB), sold 4,013 shares of the company on March 12, 2026, reducing her holdings to 13,841 shares. This sale is part of an ongoing trend, with 43 insider sells and zero insider buys at WAB over the past year. With the stock trading at $241.87 and a GuruFocus Value of $196.62, the company is considered modestly overvalued.

feed.title: Insider Buying: Jennifer Kirk Acquires Shares of Sempra (SRE)
feed.summary: Jennifer Kirk, a Director at Sempra Infrastructure, recently purchased 1,000 shares of Sempra (SRE) on March 12, 2026. This is Kirk's first acquisition of Sempra shares in the past year, bringing her total ownership to 1,000 shares. At the time of purchase, Sempra shares traded at $93.44, indicating the stock is modestly overvalued compared to its GF Value of $73.89.

feed.title: Flotek Industries Signals Data-Driven Breakout in 2026
feed.summary: Flotek Industries reported record quarterly and annual revenues since 2017, driven by explosive growth and profitability in its Data Analytics segment, which now contributes 48% of total company gross profit. Despite a softer quarter in Chemistry and temporary tax-driven EPS pressure, management highlighted 2025 as an inflection year and anticipates strong momentum extending into 2026, with PowerTech revenue projected to exceed $27 million and Data Analytics profitability expected to surpass 50% of company earnings. The company's focus on high-margin, technology-driven revenue streams and its strong backlog suggest a compelling growth story for investors, balanced against geopolitical and execution risks.

feed.title: Why Intuit (INTU) Is Down 8.6% After Soft Profit Outlook And New Anthropic AI Deal - And What's Next
feed.summary: Intuit (INTU) stock dropped 8.6% after reporting strong revenue growth but issuing a weaker-than-expected third-quarter profit outlook and maintaining its full-year revenue guidance. The company also announced a new multi-year partnership with Anthropic to integrate AI financial agents into its consumer and business workflows. This move aims to deepen customer engagement and expand Intuit's all-in-one platform vision, with investors now focused on whether AI adoption will translate into sustained revenue despite the cautious short-term profit forecast.

feed.title: A Look At Paycom Software (PAYC) Valuation After Prolonged Share Price Weakness
feed.summary: Paycom Software (PAYC) has experienced significant share price declines over the past one and three years, despite a recent 1-month upswing. A popular narrative suggests PAYC is 51.8% undervalued, citing a fair value of $260.61 against its current price of US$125.71, largely due to recurring revenue strength and product innovation like Beti. However, risks such as slower Beti adoption or weaker recurring revenue trends could challenge this optimistic outlook.

feed.title: GSK and Amgen to add medicines to TrumpRx, Fox Business reports
feed.summary: GSK and Amgen will reportedly add their medications to TrumpRX, the prescription drug website launched by former President Donald Trump's administration. This move was reported by Fox Business on Friday. The article provides a brief update on companies engaging with the TrumpRX initiative.

feed.title: Pool Corporation Stock (ISIN: US73278L1052) Faces Pressure Amid Earnings Miss and Analyst Downgrades
feed.summary: Pool Corporation (NASDAQ: POOL) is experiencing significant market pressure following a Q4 earnings miss and subsequent analyst downgrades. The company, a leading US wholesale distributor of swimming pool supplies, saw its stock decline to near 12-month lows, prompting investor concerns about cyclical demand in the outdoor living market. Despite a solid balance sheet and resilient business model, the softening demand post-pandemic and tempered guidance for FY 2026 EPS have led to a cautious 'Hold' consensus among analysts.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Julie Loeger Sells 15,000 Shares of eBay Inc (EBAY)
feed.summary: Julie Loeger, Senior Vice President and Chief Growth Officer at eBay Inc (EBAY), sold 15,000 shares of the company on March 12, 2026. This transaction brings her total ownership to 46,800 shares. eBay's stock is currently trading at $90.88, with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 1.28, indicating it is modestly overvalued according to GuruFocus's intrinsic value estimate.

feed.title: Broadridge Financial Solutions Stock: Is BR Underperforming the Technology Sector?
feed.summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions (BR) has significantly underperformed the technology sector, with its shares declining 22.5% over three months and 21% over the past year, compared to modest declines or significant gains for the broader sector ETF (XLK). Despite better-than-expected Q2 earnings, the stock dropped, and it has consistently traded below its 50-day and 200-day moving averages. Analysts, however, maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a price target suggesting a 34.3% upside.

feed.title: Waste Management (WM) Announces Departure of CFO and Transition Bonus
feed.summary: Waste Management (WM) announced that CFO Devina Rankin has resigned after 23 years with the company, effective November 1, 2025. She will receive a $1 million cash bonus for her contributions and to ensure a smooth transition, having served as an executive advisor until March 13, 2026. This move highlights Waste Management's strategy for maintaining stability during leadership changes.

feed.title: Bernstein Maintains Outperform on Molina Healthcare (MOH) March 13, 2026
feed.summary: Bernstein has maintained an Outperform rating for Molina Healthcare (MOH) but lowered its price target to $173 as of March 13, 2026. This decision reflects continued confidence in Molina's long-term strategic position despite a softer near-term outlook that prompted the price target adjustment. The financial firm cited a "soft guide" from management as the primary reason for the target reduction, leading to a modest market reaction.

feed.title: PepsiCo, Inc. Stock (ISIN: US7134481081) Holds Steady Amid Dividend Strength and Analyst Caution
feed.summary: PepsiCo, Inc. stock (PEP) maintains stability close to $160 per share, appealing to income investors with a dividend yield exceeding 3.5%, even as analyst targets suggest limited upside. The company's diversified business model, combining beverages and snacks, ensures resilient cash flows and a strong financial position despite evolving consumer trends. While offering defensive stability for long-term holders, some valuation metrics indicate potential overvaluation, and regulatory scrutiny poses risks.

feed.title: UBS Maintains Buy on Ulta Beauty, Inc. (ULTA) March 13, 2026
feed.summary: UBS has reconfirmed its Buy rating on Ulta Beauty, Inc. (ULTA) as of March 13, 2026, citing a robust product newness pipeline. Despite the maintained Buy rating, Ulta Beauty's stock (ULTA) experienced a 2.51% decline following the announcement, with its market capitalization at $24.02 billion. The UBS note did not include a new price target, prompting investors to consider this alongside recent stock weakness and upcoming company catalysts.

feed.title: Costco Wholesale (COST) Q2 Same Store Sales Growth Tests Premium Valuation Narrative
feed.summary: Costco Wholesale (COST) reported strong Q2 2026 results with US$69.6 billion revenue, US$4.58 EPS, and 7% same-store sales growth, continuing its trend of reliable profit growth for bulls. However, bears highlight a premium valuation, with a 52.3x trailing P/E significantly above peers and anticipated growth rates below market averages, questioning whether the current stock price is justified. The latest figures provide both support and challenges to analyst forecasts, underscoring the ongoing debate between Costco's consistent performance and its high valuation.

feed.title: CVKD: CAD-1005 moves to phase III for HIT, aiming to address a critical unmet need with strong safety data
feed.summary: Cadrenal Therapeutics, Inc.'s CAD-1005, a novel IV therapy for Heparin-Induced Thrombocytopenia (HIT), is progressing to phase III trials following promising phase II results and strong safety data. The drug addresses a significant unmet medical need, has Orphan Drug and Fast Track designations, and may have potential broader applications in diabetes and obesity. This advancement is based on information from a recent virtual investor forum.

feed.title: Fresenius Medical Care AG (FMS) Looks to Improve Profitability After Smashing Q4 Expectations
feed.summary: Fresenius Medical Care AG (FMS) exceeded Q4 2025 expectations with an EPS of €1.14 and stable revenue of €5.1 billion, a result of three years of strategic operational and financial decisions. The company plans to enhance profitability, aiming for a 3%–7% CAGR in operating income between 2025 and 2028, and a steady dividend program with a proposed €1.49 per share. FMS, a leading German healthcare provider operating 3,601 kidney dialysis clinics globally, is focused on improving shareholder returns despite facing regulatory hurdles.

feed.title: Velocity Financial (VEL) Net Margin Surge Tests Bearish Cash Flow Concerns
feed.summary: Velocity Financial (VEL) reported strong FY 2025 results with a significant net margin increase to 56.5% and 53.5% earnings growth, driven partly by special servicing recoveries. Despite these positive indicators and a low P/E ratio of 6.7x, concerns persist regarding its cash flow coverage for debt and recent insider selling, which some interpret as a potential value trap. Analysts acknowledge the strong profitability but caution that some contributing factors may not be repeatable.

feed.title: Form 10-K
feed.summary: This Form 10-K for SES AI Corporation details the company's financial condition and business operations for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2021. It outlines the company's focus on developing high-performance Lithium-Metal rechargeable batteries for electric vehicles, its strategic partnerships with major OEMs, and its plans for future manufacturing and growth. The report also addresses financial risks, legal compliance, and corporate governance for the newly public company.

feed.title: GECCH Bond Price and Chart — NASDAQ:GECCH
feed.summary: This article provides details on the GECCH bond, which are Great Elm Capital Corp.'s 8.125% Notes Due 2029, traded on the Nasdaq Stock Market. It offers key bond terms including outstanding amount, face value, coupon rate, frequency, maturity date, and issuer information. The company itself is a publicly traded business development company founded in 2016.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Christopher Fallon Sells Shares of Wingstop Inc (W
feed.summary: Christopher Fallon, Senior Vice President and Chief Information Officer at Wingstop Inc, sold 177 shares of the company on March 10, 2026. This transaction follows a pattern of insider selling at Wingstop, with no insider buys in the past year and 10 insider sells. Despite the insider selling, Wingstop Inc's stock is considered significantly undervalued based on its GF Value, with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 0.57.

feed.title: Advanced energy CEO Kelley sells $15.8 million in AEIS stock
feed.summary: Advanced Energy Industries CEO Stephen Douglas Kelley sold 45,551 shares of AEIS stock, valued at over $15.8 million, through a pre-arranged 10b5-1 trading plan. The shares were sold at prices ranging from $305.48 to $321.13, following a 190% surge in the stock over the past year. Despite the sale, Kelley still directly owns 80,376 shares, and the company recently reported strong Q4 2025 financial results, exceeding Wall Street expectations.

feed.title: How (FIIG) Movements Inform Risk Allocation Models
feed.summary: This article analyzes First Trust Intermediate Duration Investment Grade Corporate Etf (NASDAQ: FIIG), noting a neutral sentiment and signaling a "wait-and-see" approach due to a breakdown and elevated downside risk. It provides key support and resistance levels alongside three institutional trading strategies tailored for different risk profiles: a long position, a momentum breakout, and a short risk hedging strategy. The analysis highlights multi-timeframe signal analysis and offers AI-generated real-time trading signals and risk management tools.

feed.title: Six Flags Entertainment director Jennifer Mason to leave board after annual meeting
feed.summary: Jennifer Mason will not seek re-election to the Six Flags Entertainment board of directors when her term ends at the 2026 annual meeting. This decision comes as Six Flags faces financial headwinds, including a 54% share price decline over the past year and a substantial debt burden. Mason's departure is not due to any disagreement with the company, and the board expressed appreciation for her service, as per an SEC filing.

feed.title: VolitionRX: Navigating the Path from Innovation to Market Adoption
feed.summary: VolitionRX is a specialized firm in the laboratory technology and diagnostics sector focused on transitioning its scientific advancements into commercial success. Investors are looking for evidence that the company's diagnostic assays will be adopted within large-scale laboratory networks. The stock currently trades around $0.20, near its 52-week low, reflecting cautious investor sentiment amid high volatility and a year-to-date decline.

feed.title: W.W. Grainger Stock Drops 6% in March Amid Institutional Selling and Hold Rating
feed.summary: W.W. Grainger Inc stock (US3848021040) dropped by 6.08% in March 2026 due to institutional selling and a maintained "Hold" rating from analysts. The company's latest quarterly results showed a revenue beat but a narrow EPS miss, with major funds like Franklin Resources and Bank of Montreal Can trimming their stakes. Despite these challenges, its business model in MRO distribution shows resilience with strong e-commerce growth and a shareholder-friendly capital allocation strategy.

feed.title: F5, Inc. (FFIV) Announces Approval of 2026 Incentive Award Plan and Director Compensation Program
feed.summary: F5, Inc. (FFIV) shareholders approved the 2026 Incentive Award Plan, including the issuance of 3,500,000 new shares, and adopted a Non-Employee Director Compensation Program at their annual meeting on March 12, 2026. They also elected eight directors and ratified PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the independent accounting firm for fiscal year 2026. The meeting saw strong shareholder participation, with 52,050,157 shares represented.

feed.title: Will Danet’s Mega Tender Win and Bigger Buyback Authorization Change Palo Alto Networks' (PANW) Narrative?
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks recently secured Israel's largest network security tender through its partner Danet Communications, involving the deployment of its cybersecurity products. This win, coupled with an expanded US$5.11 billion share repurchase authorization and the US$25 billion CyberArk acquisition, reinforces the company's strategy of partner-led deals and platform expansion. The article explores how these developments impact Palo Alto Networks' investment narrative, emphasizing its projected revenue and earnings growth and offering various analyst perspectives on its fair value.

feed.title: ServiceNow Visa AI Alliance Puts Financial Services Expansion In Focus
feed.summary: ServiceNow has partnered with Visa to launch an AI-powered payment dispute platform, automating end-to-end workflows for dispute resolution. This collaboration deepens ServiceNow's presence in the financial services sector, moving beyond its traditional IT and HR focus. The initiative highlights significant real-world AI automation in core operations, signaling a potential new growth area for ServiceNow as financial institutions seek to reduce friction and costs in payment disputes.

feed.title: Ackman's Pershing Square Invests $1.8B in Meta Platforms in Q4 2025 - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Bill Ackman's investment firm, Pershing Square Capital Management, established a new stake in Meta Platforms during Q4 2025, valued at $1.8 billion, representing over 11% of the hedge fund's portfolio. Meta is significantly investing in AI capabilities and data centers, with projected capital expenditures for 2026 ranging from $115 billion to $135 billion.

feed.title: Alexander & Baldwin delisted from NYSE as $2.3 billion acquisition finalizes
feed.summary: Alexander & Baldwin, one of Hawaii's historic "Big Five" plantation firms, has been delisted from the NYSE following the completion of its $2.3 billion acquisition. A joint venture led by Blackstone, MW Group, and DivcoWest finalized the deal, taking the real estate investment trust private.

feed.title: NIKE, Inc. Stock (ISIN: US6541061031) Slides Amid Volatility as Barclays Sees Recovery Bottom
feed.summary: NIKE, Inc. stock (ISIN: US6541061031) experienced a 2.9% dip despite a recent earnings beat and an analyst upgrade from Barclays to Overweight with a $73 target. The market is weighing insider buying against persistent challenges in Greater China and Converse, while analysts remain largely optimistic about a "fundamental bottom" and operational turnaround, especially in North America. European investors can access the stock via Xetra, with dividend yields providing attractive euro-denominated income, though potential risks include prolonged consumer weakness and currency volatility.

feed.title: Why Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (ISRG) dipped more than broader market today
feed.summary: The article states that Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (ISRG) experienced a larger dip than the broader market today. No further details are provided regarding the reasons for this performance.

feed.title: Fidelity National Financial Stock (ISIN: US31620R1059) Holds Steady Amid Title Insurance Resilience
feed.summary: Fidelity National Financial (FNF), a leading US title insurer, is demonstrating robust fundamentals despite market volatility. The stock shows resilience in a challenging housing market, supported by strong dividend payouts and positive analyst sentiment, including a price target of $71 from Keefe, Bruyette & Woods. FNF's business model, focused on title insurance and transaction volumes rather than underwriting risk, offers lower volatility, making it an attractive cyclical/value play for investors eyeing a recovery in the US housing market.

feed.title: KGI Securities initiates coverage on Lowe’s (LOW) with 'neutral' rating
feed.summary: KGI Securities has initiated coverage on Lowe's (LOW) with a 'neutral' rating. This new rating provides an analyst's perspective on the company's stock as it begins to be tracked by the firm.

feed.title: UBS Maintains Neutral on Match Group, Inc. (MTCH) March 13, 2026
feed.summary: UBS reiterated a Neutral rating for Match Group, Inc. (MTCH) on March 13, 2026, without issuing a new price target. This signal implies that UBS expects MTCH's performance to be in line with its peers and the broader market. The stock experienced a minor intraday move of -0.36%, and Meyka AI rates MTCH with a B+ grade.

feed.title: Population Growth and Economic Development Drive Earnings Growth for Duke
feed.summary: This article highlights that Duke Energy's earnings growth is primarily fueled by consistent population growth and robust economic development. Morningstar analyst Andrew Bischof notes that data centers and strong customer demand are key factors supporting Duke's significant capital expenditure plans. Duke Energy is identified as one of the largest utilities in the U.S., benefiting from clear regulatory frameworks that minimize financial lag.

feed.title: Target Corp Stock (ISIN: US8725901040) Bets $2 Billion on 2026 Turnaround Amid Recovery Signals
feed.summary: Target Corporation is investing $2 billion in 2026 for store upgrades, staffing, and merchandising enhancements to drive a turnaround, following strong Q4 2025 earnings and the first positive comparable sales signal in months. The investment aims to bridge the perception gap with value leaders like Walmart and Costco, capitalizing on resilient consumer spending and a dividend yield near 5%. The stock has rebounded sharply, reflecting investor confidence in its recovery strategy.

feed.title: Taiwan's Foundry Model: The Global Chip Industry's Central Hub in 2026 - News and Statistics
feed.summary: As of early 2026, Taiwan remains the central hub for advanced semiconductor manufacturing, dominating the production of sophisticated logic chips crucial for AI systems and military hardware. This dominance, originating from a strategic shift decades ago with the pure-play foundry model, makes Taiwan an indispensable economic node but also a potential single point of failure for global supply chains. While the island faces physical constraints like resource intensity and skilled labor shortages, and geopolitical risks, TSMC is diversifying production geographically, though the most advanced research and manufacturing will stay in Taiwan.

feed.title: Team Inc. (TISI) Reports Q4 and Annual Financial Losses - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Team Inc. (TISI) has reported financial losses for both its fourth quarter and the full fiscal year. The industrial services firm experienced a net loss of $3.8 million in Q4, with adjusted per-share losses of $1.21, on revenues of $224.8 million. For the entire fiscal year, the company's net loss was $49.2 million, or $11.70 per share, with total revenues reaching $896.5 million.

feed.title: Travel + Leisure (TNL) Boosts Quarterly Dividend by 7%
feed.summary: Travel + Leisure Co. (TNL) has announced a 7% increase in its quarterly cash dividend to $0.60 per share, payable on March 31, 2026. While the company shows solid revenue growth and a strong liquidity position, it faces financial strength challenges due to high debt and a mixed valuation picture, suggesting a need for careful investor consideration despite cautiously optimistic analyst sentiment.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Mark Romaine Sells Shares of Global Partners LP
feed.summary: Mark Romaine, COO of Global Companies LLC (a subsidiary of Global Partners LP), sold 3,697 shares of Global Partners LP (GLP) on March 13, 2026, bringing his total ownership to 162,660 shares. This transaction is part of a larger trend where Romaine has sold 57,455 shares over the past year without any purchases. The stock is currently trading at $47.76, and Global Partners LP is considered modestly undervalued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 0.87.

feed.title: Lyell Immunopharma 2025 Financial Results: Annual Loss of $274.4M - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Lyell Immunopharma reported a net loss of $140.7 million for the final quarter of 2025, with revenue totaling $6,000. For the full fiscal year 2025, the company announced an annual net loss of $274.4 million and annual revenue of $36,000. This financial update includes a comprehensive report on the antisera industry in the United States, detailing market dynamics, trade flows, and forecasts to 2035.

feed.title: Turtle Beach Q4 2025 Results: Profit of $17.6M, Revenue Below Forecast - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Turtle Beach Corp reported a Q4 2025 profit of $17.6 million ($0.87 per share, or $0.89 adjusted), falling short of analyst expectations of $1.12 per share. The company's revenue of $118.8 million also missed forecasts of $143.1 million. For the full year, Turtle Beach announced a profit of $15.7 million ($0.77 per share) on $319.9 million in revenue, and provided future revenue guidance of $335 million to $355 million.

feed.title: Greenfire Resources (NYSE:GFR) Quarterly Loss Challenges Bullish Margin Improvement Narrative
feed.summary: Greenfire Resources (NYSE:GFR) reported a Q3 FY 2025 loss of C$0.12 EPS, challenging its recent bullish narrative of improved margins, despite trailing 12-month net profit margin being higher and earnings rising sharply. The company's P/E ratio is significantly lower than the industry average, and its share price is well below its DCF fair value, yet a five-year annual earnings decline remains a concern. The latest quarterly loss signals variability in its financial performance, prompting investors to assess long-term trends versus recent gains.

feed.title: Russell 2000 Analysis: 3 Stocks with Stagnant Sales and Operational Challenges - News and Statistics
feed.summary: This article analyzes three Russell 2000 companies—Lindsay Corporation, ICU Medical, Inc., and Enact Holdings, Inc.—that are experiencing stagnant sales and operational challenges. Lindsay faces flat sales and diminishing returns on capital, ICU Medical struggles with stagnant sales, a projected decline, and increased capital intensity, and Enact Holdings has seen stagnant net premiums and lagging EPS growth. The report highlights these firms due to their common pattern of sales stagnation and specific cyclical headwinds.

feed.title: Using AI in Disclosure: a Roundtable Discussion
feed.summary: This article discusses the evolving role of AI, particularly generative AI, in legal disclosure processes for litigation. It highlights how AI can address the challenges of large-scale electronic document review and outlines a roundtable discussion featured in PLC Magazine. The discussion covers AI adoption, legal considerations, cost, risk management, and the future of e-disclosure.

feed.title: Price-Driven Insight from (EICB) for Rule-Based Strategy
feed.summary: This article from Stock Traders Daily provides a price-driven insight into Eagle Point Income Company Inc. (EICB) for rule-based trading strategies. It outlines three AI-generated trading strategies—Position Trading, Momentum Breakout, and Risk Hedging—although specific entry/exit points are listed as "N/A." The piece emphasizes institutional-grade analysis, real-time signals, and customizable risk models for users.
